description: Contact Merge & Duplicate Detection Wiring. (1) mergeContacts deletes secondary without re-parenting all child records — orphaned opportunities/tasks (W-03). (2) findPotentialDuplicates exists in service but no tRPC procedure exposes it (W-09). (3) mergeContacts exists but no router procedure wraps it (W-10). (4) mergeContacts no cross-tenant check between primary and secondary (W-12). (5) associateWithAccount inside mergeContacts causes double-save and potential double event emission (W-13). Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §17.
notes: Contact audit finding: W-03,W-09,W-10,W-12,W-13. See docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md
